input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule D.12.10.6 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: d.12.10.6
            TITLE: based on the inspection or discussion during a black flag period, the vehicle may not be

            CONTENT:
            rule D.12.10.6: Based on the inspection or discussion during a Black Flag period, the vehicle may not be
D.12.10.6 Based on the inspection or discussion during a Black Flag period, the vehicle may not be 
allowed to continue the Endurance Run and will be scored DNF

final_answer: Based on the inspection or discussion during a Black Flag period, the vehicle may not be allowed to continue the Endurance Run and will be scored DNF
